## Before you continue, please read the following:
You must follow the following rules below when creating a new bug report or feature request for PolyMSNP.

# Rules
1. Issues must have a descriptive title (e.g. do not create issues just called "polymsnp is broken" or "new feature for polymsnp")
2. Bug reports must contain a detailed description of what the bug is, how to replicate it, and if possible a screenshot or video of the output of the browser's JavaScript console (and/or the PolyMSNP server's console output if you are running it locally).
3. Make sure that any bugs you are reporting affect the latest version or build of PolyMSNP.
4. When requesting a feature, make sure that it is not listed as a "wontfix" feature in the project README.
5. Requests cannot include features that were introduced after MSN Messenger 7.0 (e.g. offline messaging)

Issues which do not follow these rules will be automatically removed and deleted.
